The '''Res-a Technology Center''' was a research facility model, designed by the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]], that was used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to develop new technologies supporting the war effort. The [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] also got full rights to produce the technology for their own use.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
